text.message: Oj, can we trade road materials for sheep and wehat?
why was i solo blocked in last place
I'll take it off for a sheep oj
im glad black was solo blocking me early
yeah not much you can do
once red gets army itll be close
You may have the win in hand with army
Sorry...didn't want to take it off the 8 of course
But I have to take army now
I'll put it back on the 8 now
its obviously between you 2 so im not gonna trade anyone
just let it settle how it settles
im feeling a lucky vp pull
Let's trade rock for wheat oj
I will give you ore for wheat black
